Documentation only — engine files are third-party and NEVER modified. Bundled engines:
Stockfish, Dragon/Komodo, Rodent IV (39 personalities), Maia 3 (ONNX), Torch, and an

in the engines; the unlock removes the ELO cap and search-budget limits in settings, not here.
